text.message: Man I want 8 10, but id be too mad
I think it’s in your own interest
that's my only block, I guess
Its essentially a solo red lol
So you may as well just pick wherever
maybe I'll have to solo him at some point
I just need space to build roads
Now you risk being cut off
oj steals road for the win
You probably have vp or mono
tell me how I get to 10
Were all 8, except one 7 with mono?
